text.title: Wireframing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Wireframing end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: intake-brief
step.action: Identify the screen's primary purpose + decision-ask.

step.name: sketch-hierarchy
step.action: Order content into H1 / H2 / body slots.

step.name: pick-grid
step.action: Pick columns + breakpoints for the screen.

step.name: place-primary-action
step.action: Name the CTA (verb+object); place at structural focal point.

step.name: fill-content-slots
step.action: Mark content slots with annotation or Lorem.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator (fidelity discipline); commit to the wireframe store.
